task: Mechanism repair for formal-operation user feedback boundary and no-degrade completion gate.
current_goal: Write the user feedback responsibility boundary, self_repair_audit, fallback authorization, completion_truth_check, and no_degrade_completion rules into repository mechanisms without changing media or advancing status.

risk_questions: Which current mechanism files could still allow fallback, technical_preview, partial result, or internal_diagnostic_only to be treated as completed?
Which files need self_repair_audit triggers when the user only reports an unqualified result?
Which status fields must not be promoted in this mechanism-only repair?
Which wording could confuse fallback suggestion with completed result?
fallback_policy: fallback_local_only may support this low-risk mechanism repair because this turn forbids extra API calls; it is not a DeepSeek conclusion and cannot be used as completed evidence.
forbidden_actions: Do not read or print .env, .env.local, API key, token, or secret values.
Do not call media generation, TTS, voice cloning, or external APIs in this turn.
Do not edit source materials or media outputs.
Do not promote content_validation, send_ready, publish_status_success, voice_validation, final_voice_validated, visual_master_locked, data_flywheel_passed, or commercial_validation_passed.
stop_condition: Stop after local-only risk framing; Codex must verify original files directly and report not_deepseek_conclusion=true.
